title: WebSockets vs SSE vs long-polling: which fits?
meta_description: SSE costs 45% less than WebSockets and 80% less than long polling at 1000 users/day — benchmark results from Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSockets because it feels modern, then burn CPU chasing reconnects.

SSE beats WebSocket on cost and CPU, long polling loses on memory.

https://kubaik.github.io/websockets-vs-sse-vs-long-polling-which-fits

#Web3 #WebDev #Performance #Redis

What's the tool you wished you'd found earlier?
